methodology: Naive workflow reads the full source corpus before deciding where to inspect. Graph-guided LLM workflow starts from Graphify node foo() and sends only its graph neighborhood plus the target source file to the LLM.

targeted_agent_context.context: foo() node, source location, three direct graph edges, target source file, and original broken snippet

actual_llm_usage.note: No private API token log is committed to the repository.
